i %3C coluna_index; i++ %7B%0A%09%09if e.it_char == e.it_line.Value.End() %7B%0A%09%09%09break%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%09e.it_char = e.it_char.Next()%0A%09%7D%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc (e *Editor) KeyDown() %7B%0A%09if e.it_line.Next() == e.texto.End() %7B // Corrigido: Evita crash ao tentar descer na %C3%BAltima linha%0A%09%09return%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09coluna_index := e.it_line.Value.IndexOf(e.it_char)%0A%0A%09e.it_line = e.it_line.Next()%0A%09e.it_char = e.it_line.Value.Front()%0A%0A%09for i := 0; i %3C coluna_index; i++ %7B%0A%09%09if e.it_char == e.it_line.Value.End() %7B%0A%09%09%09break%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%09e.it_char = e.it_char.Next()%0A%09%7D%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc (e *Editor) KeyBackspace() %7B%0A%09alvo := e.it_char.Prev()%0A%09if alvo == e.it_line.Value.End() %7B%0A%09%09return%0A%09%7D%0A%09e.it_line.Value.Erase(alvo)%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc (e *Editor) KeyDelete() %7B%0A%09alvo := e.it_char.Next()%0A%09if alvo == e.it_line.Value.End() %7B%0A%09%09return%0A%09%7D%0A%09e.it_line.Value.Erase(alvo)%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc NewEditor() *Editor %7B%0A%09e := &Editor%7B%7D%0A%09%0A%09screen, err := tcell.NewScreen()%0A%09if err != nil %7B%0A%09%09panic(fmt.Sprintf(%22erro ao criar a tela: %25v%22, err)) // Corrigido: Interrompe se falhar%0A%09%7D%0A%09if err := screen.Init(); err != nil %7B%0A%09%09panic(fmt.Sprintf(%22erro ao iniciar a tela: %25v%22, err)) // Corrigido: Interrompe se falhar%0A%09%7D%0A%09%0A%09e.screen = screen%0A%09e.texto = NewList%5B*List%5Brune%5D%5D()%0A%09e.texto.PushBack(NewList%5Brune%5D())%0A%09e.it_line = e.texto.Front()%0A%09e.it_char = e.it_line.Value.Back()%0A%09%0A%09e.style = tcell.StyleDefault.Foreground(tcell.ColorWhite).Background(tcell.ColorBlack)%0A%09e.screen.SetStyle(e.style)%0A%09e.screen.Clear()%0A%09return e%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc (e *Editor) Draw() %7B%0A%09e.screen.Clear()%0A%09x := 0%0A%09y := 0%0A%09for line := e.texto.Front(); line != e.texto.End(); line = line.Next() %7B%0A%09%09for char := line.Value.Front(); ; char = char.Next() %7B%0A%09%09%09data := char.Value%0A%09%09%09if char == line.Value.End() %7B%0A%09%09%09%09data = '%E2%A4%B6'%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%09if data == ' ' %7B%0A%09%09%09%09data = '%C2%B7'%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%09if char == e.it_char %7B%0A%09%09%09%09e.screen.SetContent(x, y, data, nil, e.style.Reverse(true))%0A%09%09%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09%09%09e.screen.SetContent(x, y, data, nil, e.style)%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%09x++%0A%09%09%09if char == line.Value.End() %7B%0A%09%09%09%09break%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%09y++%0A%09%09x = 0%0A%09%7D%0A%09e.screen.Show()%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc (e *Editor) MainLoop() %7B%0A%09for %7B%0A%09%09ev := e.screen.PollEvent()%0A%09%09switch ev := ev.(type) %7B%0A%09%09case *tcell.EventKey:%0A%09%09%09switch ev.Key() %7B%0A%09%09%09case tcell.KeyEsc, tcell.KeyCtrlC:%0A%09%09%09%09return%0A%09%09%09case tcell.KeyEnter:%0A%09%09%09%09e.KeyEnter()%0A%09%09%09case tcell.KeyLeft:%0A%09%09%09%09e.KeyLeft()%0A%09%09%09case tcell.KeyRight:%0A%09%09%09%09e.KeyRight()%0A%09%09%09case tcell.KeyUp:%0A%09%09%09%09e.KeyUp()%0A%09%09%09case tcell.KeyDown:%0A%09%09%09%09e.KeyDown()%0A%09%09%09case tcell.KeyBackspace, tcell.KeyBackspace2:%0A%09%09%09%09e.KeyBackspace()%0A%09%09%09case tcell.KeyDelete:%0A%09%09%09%09e.KeyDelete()%0A%09%09%09default:%0A%09%09%09%09if ev.Rune() != 0 %7B%0A%09%09%09%09%09e.InsertChar(ev.Rune())%0A%09%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%09e.Draw()%0A%09%09case *tcell.EventResize:%0A%09%09%09e.screen.Sync()%0A%09%09%09e.Draw()%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%7D%0A%0A// ==========================================%0A// PONTO DE ENTRADA DO PROGRAMA%0A// ==========================================%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09editor := NewEditor()%0A%09defer editor.screen.Fini() // Garante que o terminal volte ao normal se o app fechar%0A%09editor.Draw()%0A%09editor.MainLoop()%0A%7D%0A
